nasb.text: Nevertheless you shall not build the house, but your son who will be born to you, he shall build the house for My name.’

esv.text: Nevertheless, it is not you who shall build the house, but your son who shall be born to you shall build the house for my name.’

cnv.text: 不過不是由你建造殿宇，而是你的兒子，你親生的兒子，他必為我的名建殿。’

ccb.text: 但你不要建，要由你的亲生儿子为我建殿。’
